title: corethrogyne filaginifolia var. incana
intro: Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. incana, also known as Incense Plant or Gray-haired Corethrogyne, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. incana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
